query:
DELETE FROM product_batches;

INSERT INTO product_variants (productId, variantCode, variantName, productionStatus, variantType, customerId, createdBy, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT p.id, 'SB-001-B001', 'Gray sofa bed with custom dimensions', 'completed', 'exclusive', (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 0), 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-001-GRY'
UNION ALL
SELECT p.id, 'SB-001-B002', 'Darker gray fabric upgrade', 'in_progress', 'exclusive', (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-001-GRY'
UNION ALL
SELECT p.id, 'SB-001-B003', 'Standard version, bulk order 10+ units', 'pending', 'exclusive', (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 2), 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-001-GRY'
UNION ALL
SELECT p.id, 'SB-001-B004', 'Premium foam upgrade', 'completed', 'exclusive', (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 3), 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-001-GRY';
